name: Demo feedback

## What were you trying to do?

Describe the model, workflow, or output you were testing.

## Which data did you use?

- [ ] Built-in example data
- [ ] Uploaded data

If uploaded data, please describe the grouping structure and outcome type.

## What happened?

Describe what you saw. Screenshots are welcome.

## What did you expect?

Describe what would have been clearer, more useful, or more correct.

## App section

- [ ] Data
- [ ] Model
- [ ] Estimate
- [ ] Results
- [ ] Report & Code
- [ ] About

## Generated code or error text

Paste any relevant R code, warning, or error message here.
